channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: us
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: us

item.title: Romanians cast ballots in parliamentary election as turmoil in presidential race grips the nation
item.description: BUCHAREST, Romania (AP) — Romanians are casting ballots in a parliamentary election on Sunday sandwiched between a two-round presidential race, the first round of which has plunged the European Union and NATO member country into unprecedented turmoil following allegations of electoral violations and
item.dc:creator: STEPHEN McGRATH, Associated Press, PHL 17

item.title: Martha Stewart's anger at James Comey for making her 'trophy' criminal is 'understandable,' attorney says
item.description: Martha Stewart said then-U.S. Attorney James Comey and other prosecutors used her as a "trophy" during her criminal trial in 2004 in the new Netflix documentary, "Martha.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Trump selects veteran law enforcement officer Chad Chronister for DEA administrator
item.description: President-elect Donald Trump announced he would nominate Florida Sheriff Chad Chronister to serve as the administrator for the Drug Enforcement Agency. “I am pleased to nominate Sheriff Chad Chronister for Administrator of the Drug Enforcement Agency (DEA),” he wrote in a post on Truth Social.
item.dc:creator: Ashleigh Fields, NewsNation

item.title: After entering Aleppo, Syrian insurgents advance to a nearby province. Assad says he'll defeat them
item.description: BEIRUT (AP) — Thousands of Syrian insurgents took over most of Aleppo on Saturday, establishing positions in the country's largest city and controlling its airport before expanding their shock offensive to a nearby province.
item.dc:creator: SARAH EL DEEB, Associated Press, PHL 17

item.title: Southwest Airlines to end cabin service earlier on flights to reduce chance of injury
item.description: Southwest Airlines says it is ending cabin service earlier on flights, requiring passengers to do the usual pre-landing procedures such as ensuring their seatbelts are fastened and returning their seats to an upright position earlier than before. Beginning on Dec.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, ABC 4

item.title: Storm blankets parts of the US during busy holiday travel weekend with more snow and cold forecast
item.description: BUFFALO, N.Y. (AP) — The first big snowfall of the season blanketed parts of New York, Pennsylvania and Michigan during the hectic U.S.
item.dc:creator: ANTHONY IZAGUIRRE, RICK CALLAHAN and CAROLYN THOMPSON, Associated Press, KREX 5

item.title: Don't fall for this secret Santa gift scam
item.description: A secret Santa-inspired scam is making its rounds again on social media, the Better Business Bureau warns. You may see it being called "Secret Sister" or "Secret Santa Dog" – but either way, it's illegal.
item.dc:creator: Alix Martichoux, Fox 5

item.title: Trump taps Kash Patel for FBI director, an ally who would aid in his effort to upend law enforcement
item.description: WASHINGTON (AP) — President-elect Donald Trump says he will nominate Kash Patel to serve as FBI director, turning to a fierce ally to upend America’s premier law enforcement agency and rid the government of perceived “conspirators.
item.dc:creator: ERIC TUCKER and ALAN SUDERMAN, Associated Press, KREX 5

item.title: What to know about Kash Patel, Trump’s pick to lead the FBI
item.description: Kash Patel has called for radical changes at the FBI and was a fierce and vocal critic of the bureau’s work as it investigated ties between Russia and Donald Trump’s 2016 presidential campaign.
item.dc:creator: Eric Tucker And Alan Suderman, Associated Press, KPRC 2

item.title: Hamas releases new hostage video of American-Israeli Edan Alexander
item.description: Hamas released a propaganda video Saturday showing the 20-year-old Alexander alive, marking his first proof of life since being kidnapped.
item.dc:creator: Mills Hayes, NewsNation

item.title: Biden's Thanksgiving holiday is part of a longer farewell as Trump's return to White House nears
item.description: NANTUCKET, Mass. (AP) — Joe Biden is wrapping up his final Thanksgiving holiday as president on Nantucket, a family tradition that this year seems to be part of a broader farewell to his time in the White House.
item.dc:creator: JOSH BOAK, Associated Press, PHL 17

item.title: Florida grandfather, 71, fatally shot by neighbor during noise dispute; suspected gunman claims self-defense
item.description: A 71-year-old Florida man was allegedly shot to death by his downstairs neighbor in Lauderdale Lakes after the neighbor complained about loud music.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Credit card debt is soaring – what to know about getting out of it
item.description: With credit card debt reaching an all-time high, now is the time for the most pertinent questions and answers surrounding a difficult reality many Americans are facing.
item.dc:creator: Patrick Djordjevic, Fox 5

item.title: Truck carrying 44,000 pounds of dried chickpeas catches fire in Death Valley National Park
item.description: A truck carrying 44,000 pounds of dried chickpeas caught fire in Death Valley National Park, according to the National Park Service.
item.dc:creator: Linsey Lewis, Fox 5

item.title: Trump wants pardoned real estate developer Charles Kushner to become US ambassador to France
item.description: WEST PALM BEACH, Fla. (AP) — President-elect Donald Trump said Saturday he intends to nominate real estate developer Charles Kushner, father of Trump’s son-in-law Jared Kushner, to serve as ambassador to France.
item.dc:creator: FATIMA HUSSEIN and ERIC TUCKER, Associated Press, WFLA, NBC

item.title: Gaetz saga moves toward final act in House
item.description: Former Rep. Matt Gaetz’s (R-Fla.) time in Congress may be over, but the saga over the House Ethics Committee’s report on its years-long investigation into him is in its final act.
item.dc:creator: Emily Brooks, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Ohio State, Michigan players involved in melee after Buckeyes loss, multiple people pepper sprayed
item.description: COLUMBUS, Ohio (WCMH) — Michigan players planted their team flag at midfield of Ohio Stadium on Saturday afternoon after a 13-10 win over No. 2 Ohio State, leading to a brawl between players from both teams with police attempting to separate the sides and pepper spray being used.
item.dc:creator: Orri Benatar, WGN 9

item.title: Pennsylvania restaurant ordered to pay $184,000 for withholding tips
item.description: PITTSBURGH, Pa. (WHTM) - A Pennsylvania restaurant was ordered to pay $184,000 in back wages, damages, and penalties after an investigation found they withheld tips. The U.S.
item.dc:creator: George Stockburger, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Trump tariffs threaten to crack open North American economies
item.description: MEXICO CITY — President-elect Trump’s pledge to impose tariffs on Mexico and Canada threatens to upend decades of North American integration, a bumpy process that’s recast the two U.S. neighbors as providers of raw and finished goods for the world’s biggest economy.
item.dc:creator: Rafael Bernal, WFLA, NBC

item.title: Video: Colorado officer uses kid's bike during pursuit
item.description: A Lone Tree police officer went above and beyond to try and catch a theft suspect who fled on a scooter in a neighborhood.
item.dc:creator: Maddie Rhodes, KTLA 5

item.title: Los Angeles Dodgers extend contract of postseason hero
item.description: The Los Angeles Dodgers have agreed to a contract extension with one of the key pieces of the team's World Series title run. The Dodgers reached agreement Friday on a deal with Tommy Edman, ensuring that the do-it-all utility-man will remain with the team for the foreseeable future.
item.dc:creator: Travis Schlepp, KTLA 5

item.title: US-based model, husband and child kidnapped and held 12 hours after leaving restaurant in Brazil: reports
item.description: A Brazilian model who lives in the U.S. was kidnapped along with her husband and child in her home country this week and held captive for 12 hours.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: The ‘Most Wished For’ Amazon items on sale for Black Friday
item.description: These are the most-wanted Amazon items among shoppers — at least, the ones that have great deals going on for Black Friday
item.dc:creator: Christina Marfice, NewsNation

item.title: British lawmakers move closer to allowing terminally ill adults to end their lives
item.description: Members of Parliament approved the assisted dying bill by a 330-275 vote, signaling their approval in principle for the bill, which will undergo further scrutiny before it goes to a final vote.
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Watch: Colorado officer uses kid's bike during pursuit
item.description: A Lone Tree police officer went above and beyond to try and catch a theft suspect who fled on a scooter in a neighborhood.
item.dc:creator: Maddie Rhodes, WFLA, NBC

item.title: Suspect accused in dad's camping murder 'cut off' from self-defense claim after backtracking on confession
item.description: The suspect in the murder of a Montana dad and avid outdoorsman pleaded not guilty Tuesday after allegedly claiming self-defense in his confession to police.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Sniper kills Florida man who fired 200 rounds at neighboring condos
item.description: A Florida man was killed by a Volusia Sheriff's Office sniper after he reportedly fired more than 200 rounds at neighboring condos over several hours on Thanksgiving morning, authorities said.
item.dc:creator: Kevin Accettulla, NewsNation

item.title: 5 tips to avoid overspending this holiday season
item.description: Nearly 30% of credit card users are still paying off last year's holiday debt. Here are five tips to avoid overspending.
item.dc:creator: Andrew Dorn, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Cryptocurrency entrepreneur who bought banana art for $6.2 million eats the fruit in Hong Kong
item.description: A cryptocurrency entrepreneur who bought a piece of conceptual art consisting of a simple banana, duct-taped to a wall, for $6.2 million last week ate the fruit in Hong Kong on Friday.
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Arizona executions to resume, breaking 2-year pause during review of state death penalty procedures
item.description: PHOENIX (AP) — Executions will resume in Arizona following a two-year pause, the state's top prosecutor says.
item.dc:creator: ANITA SNOW, Associated Press, KLAS, CBS News

item.title: US faith-based missionaries build homes for Mexican poor south of the border
item.description: A group of 150 faith-based volunteers from North Texas traveled south of the border in the days before Thanksgiving and built several homes for the poor in Reynosa, Mexico. One family sat down with Border Report and detailed their experience.
item.dc:creator: Sandra Sanchez, Fox 5

item.title: 3 killed, 1 seriously injured in Tesla Cybertruck crash in Northern California
item.description: PIEDMONT, Calif. (AP) — Three people were killed and one seriously injured early Wednesday when a Tesla Cybertruck crashed and caught fire in Northern California, officials said.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, ABC 4

item.title: How to avoid starting 'phantom traffic jams' this holiday travel season
item.description: Bumper-to-bumper traffic is a regular occurrence for holiday travelers. However, researchers with Vanderbilt University hope findings from a large traffic study can help.
item.dc:creator: Kori Johnson, Fox 5

item.title: Trump nominees targeted in series of threats, spokesperson says
item.description: (The Hill) - Multiple nominees and appointees tapped to serve in President-elect Trump’s incoming administration were targeted with threats this week, a spokesperson for the transition said Wednesday, though it was unclear how many were affected.
item.dc:creator: Brett Samuels, Fox 5

item.title: California man arrested for allegedly smuggling meth-caked clothing through LAX
item.description: Authorities found more than a dozen clothing items, including a cow pajama onesie, that were dried stiff and covered in a white residue.
item.dc:creator: Vivian Chow, ABC 4

item.title: 3 Americans held for years in China have been released, White House says
item.description: Three American citizens imprisoned for years by China have been released and are returning to the United States, the White House said Wednesday, announcing a rare diplomatic agreement with Beijing in the final months of the Biden administration.
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press, WFLA, NBC
